title: Index Management on ODBC
text: Index Management on ODBC The following types of indexes are created: UNIQUE for primary and candidate keys DUPLICATE for all others The index is created when the table is created, either on the fly or using SQL scripts generated by the Create Table facility. The SQL statement which does this is create index . Use the key syntax connector option to specify the ‘Index type’ and ‘Primary key’ clause that were used in the old configuration utility ODBCCONF .
